name: Requests without an auth token are rejected across all endpoints
statusMessage:
XFAIL Unauthenticated request returns 403 instead of documented 401 (see issue #9)

AssertionError: assert 403 == <HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED: 401>
 +  where 403 = <Response [403 Forbidden]>.status_code
 +  and   <HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED: 401> = HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED

testStage.statusMessage:
